## Checklist

### Before requesting review

- [ ] This PR addresses one focused change.
- [ ] I have read the relevant source files before editing.
- [ ] I can explain every changed line in this PR.
- [ ] I have run `ruff check .` with no new warnings.
- [ ] I have run `mypy` with no new errors.
- [ ] I have run `pytest` and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for any behavior I changed.

### Code quality

- [ ] The code does not introduce dead code, stale comments, or unused imports.
- [ ] Error messages are clear and specific to the failure.
- [ ] No AI-generated marketing copy, vague claims, or inflated scope.

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the README or docs if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] Commit messages follow the project style (lowercase, no smart quotes).

### Packaging and release

- [ ] I have not committed build outputs, virtual environments, secrets, or media files.
- [ ] I have kept the version in `pyproject.toml` and `src/yaatv/__init__.py` in sync if this PR includes a version bump.
